_comment: Manual gear additions/fixes applied in scripts/build-gear.mjs. Use for items that exist in the live game but are in NEITHER upstream source (spiritvalemarket catalog, base44 equipment), and to add/fix craft recipes (zone) so items resolve to the route. `add` = full item objects (matching gear.json item shape); `craft` = { slug: { zoneSlug, zoneName, materials } } applied onto existing items.

add.name: Grave Helm
add.description: Pale teeth gnash silently, because helmets should not need jaws.
